title: Tangy Croatian Berry Crumble
description: A quick-fix croatian dish featuring tangy reduced mixed berries topped with a crumbly, halal-friendly topping.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine berries, reduced cherry juice concentrate, honey or maple syrup, cinnamon, and ginger. Mix well.
Fold in flour and brown sugar. Stir until the mixture is moist but not soupy.
Spread berry mixture evenly into an 8x8 inch baking dish. Dot with melted butter.
In another bowl, mix together all-purpose flour and brown sugar. Add melted butter and stir until crumbly.
Sprinkle crumble topping over the berries in the pan.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until topping is golden brown and juices are bubbling up from bottom of dish.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
